nameMeanings.name: Pryce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Jewish   Preuss   or   Preis  .

variants.name: Price
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Rhys ‘son of Rhys’ (see Reece ). This is one of the commonest of Welsh surnames. It has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
English: nickname from Middle English, Old French pris ‘excellent, noble, highly valued (person)’.
Americanized form of Jewish   Preuss   or   Preis  .

nameMeanings.name: Elynor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Elynor Pryce was born about 1346, in Herefordshire, England. She married Thomas Bromwich about 1364, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Elynor Pryce est née environ 1346, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Thomas Bromwich environ 1364, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Elynor Pryce wurde um 1346 in Herefordshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1364 in Herefordshire, England Thomas Bromwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Elynor Pryce è nata il circa 1346 nel Herefordshire, England. Lei sposato Thomas Bromwich circa 1364, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: Elynor Pryce(은)는 대략 1346년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1364년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Thomas Bromwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elynor Pryce nasceu aproximadamente 1346, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bromwich aproximadamente 1364, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Elynor Pryce родилась около 1346 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bromwich около 1364 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Elynor Pryce nació aproximadamente 1346, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Thomas Bromwich aproximadamente 1364, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas.
